# /waiver

## Purpose
Record an explicit exception when a gate cannot be satisfied normally.

## When To Use
Only when a documented exception is needed to keep the flow auditable.

## Required Contracts
- `waiver-exception` - Exception records are explicit, auditable, and contract-shaped (`framework/scripts/gates/validate_waiver.py`)
